[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00001000 1
1 01000110 3
2 00110010 3
3 11001000 3
4 10101000 3
5 11111111 a
6 10001101 4
7 00111011 5

01 10 11111010 6
12 21 11101000 4
23 32 11111111 a match 5
34 43 11111111 a match 5
45 54 10111111 7
56 65 01111111 7
67 76 01001110 4
70 07 01110110 5

02 20 10111010 5
13 31 11111111 a match 5
24 42 10101101 5
35 53 11111111 a match 5
46 64 11001111 6
57 75 01111111 7
60 06 01111110 6
71 17 11001110 5

03 30 11111111 a match 5
14 41 11001101 5
25 52 10111011 6
36 63 11111111 a match 5
47 74 11001111 6
50 05 00111011 5 match 7
61 16 11001110 5
72 27 11101110 6

04 40 10111111 7
15 51 11111011 7
26 62 11101110 6
37 73 11111111 a match 5
[completion]
0 absent
1 absent

none
